health_score_note: Down 2 from 88/B+ (2026-05-28): new critical ship-bug #15426 ARM64 native module crash in v1.9.7 portable (-2). Security issue #15372 still open (no change).

age_distribution.note: From 100 most recently updated issues; remaining ~784 unsampled. Bug-labeled backlog is 94% zombie.

label_health.unlabeled_note: Confirmed total from no:label search query (not just sample)

p1_critical_issues.title: [Bug] v1.9.7 Windows x64 portable ships ARM64 native module (registry.node), breaking OpenClaw entirely
p1_critical_issues.detail: ARM64 registry.node bundled in x64 portable → ERR_DLOPEN_FAILED → IPC broken → MemoryService crash → OpenClaw UI inaccessible. Affects all v1.9.7 Windows x64 portable users. Workaround: use installer (.exe) version.

security_alerts.title: [Bug]: MCP OAuth callback accepts first code without state validation
security_alerts.detail: OAuth CSRF attack vector: state parameter not validated before token exchange
